title: Piquant French Chicken Quiche
description: A spicy and indulgent French quiche featuring dark soy sauce and braised chicken, perfect for a special occasion. This halal-friendly dish is sure to impress with its rich and gooey texture.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat and cook the chicken until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the dark soy sauce to the skillet and stir to combine, then set aside to cool.
Roll out the pie crust and place it in a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, heavy cream, gruyere cheese, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooled chicken mixture to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture into the pie crust and smooth the top.
Bake the quiche for 35-40 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set.
Remove the quiche from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
